title: Certificate course in Graphology and personality profiling
content: The Certificate Course in Graphology and Personality Profiling trains professionals to analyze handwriting for behavioral insights, fraud detection, and psychological assessment. Covering stroke patterns, pressure analysis, and emotional indicators, it benefits forensic experts, HR professionals, and investigators in personality evaluation, recruitment, and criminal profiling. Pass in Class XII 01 Understand the psychological and neurological basis of handwriting. 02 Learn the core principles of graphology for personality assessment. 03 Apply graphological methods to behavioural profiling, recruitment, counselling, and forensic contexts. 04 Identify deception, emotional disturbance, and risk behaviours through handwriting. 01 Be proficient in analyzing handwriting to derive psychological insights. 02 Apply graphology in personal development, HR, counseling, and basic forensic profiling. 03 Understand ethical limitations and ensure responsible application. 04 Be able to create basic to advanced personality profiles based on handwriting and behavioral patterns.
